About Organization

Western Coalfield Limited (WCL) is a government-owned company that operates in the coal mining sector.

WCL is headquartered in India and is responsible for the exploration, production, and distribution of coal.

About the Programme

The WCL Mining Sirdar, Assistant Foreman Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the posts of Mining Sirdar and Assistant Foreman.
